resources.string: Cold start made the button stick — hands free mode activated 😅

Select background and text color:

Black background and white text → classic high contrast.

Black background and yellow text → high contrast, suitable for dyslexia.

Blue background and white text → clearly visible.

Dark blue background and yellow text → improved readability.

Dark green background and white text → soft contrast, suitable for color blindness.

Dark gray background and white text → reduced brightness, suitable for light sensitivity.
Library initialization error. The voice model files may have been deleted or corrupted by third-party applications (optimizers, memory cleaners, etc.). Please try reinstalling the application.
Library extraction error, please restart the app

Instructions:

1. Press and hold the microphone button and speak. The app will analyze your speech in real time. A preliminary result will appear on the screen.
2. After finishing your phrase, wait until the preliminary result disappears, then release the microphone button.
3. The final result will appear on the screen.

If you release the microphone button before finishing your sentence, only the preliminary result will be saved.



This app uses open-source and third-party libraries:

1. vosk-model-small-tr-0.3 Link
Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0.
Copyright © Alpha Cephei Inc.

The library version used is shown on the app screen.
You can use your own VOSK library version by downloading the archive of the desired version, for example, from the link
https://alphacephei.com/vosk/models
The archive for mobile devices is usually labeled "small" and is about 50MB in size.
Unzip it, and place the resulting folder, preferably without duplicates, in the app folder -
/Android/data/com.safelogj.echolog/files/you_vosk_lib
If your library initializes successfully, its name will appear on the app screen. Otherwise, the built-in version will be used.

2. Lottie Link
Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0.
Copyright © Airbnb, Inc.

3. Okio Link
Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0.
Copyright © Square, Inc.

4. Java Native Access (JNA) Link
Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0.
Copyright © Timothy Wall, Todd Fast, Liang Chen, et al.

5. Free Loading Animation Link
Licensed under the Lottie Simple License (FL 9.13.21).
Author: Eddy Koek

6. Free Rotate Phone Animation Link
Licensed under the Lottie Simple License (FL 9.13.21).
Author: Sandeep Maurya

Privacy Policy
